examples: If the toco toucan had evolved in chilly Ireland, its impressive bill would have been much more modest.
Last year Glenn Tattersall of Brock University in Ontario, Canada, found the toco toucan loses up to 60 per cent of its body heat through its beak.
The boy doesn't want to catch [get] a toco.
By the end of my stay, I'd worked my way up to tackling the summit of Cerro Toco at 18, 386 feet, the highest I'd ever climbed.
